rows.description: Recepta Anni 1757 Nov. 2.do ad Annum 1758 ad eundem Diem
rows.notes: Visual override: Based on the image, this is the first physical line of the header. Gemini-flash combined it with the next line; GPT-5-mini correctly identified this line as a distinct row but with a slight transcription difference ('2do' vs '2.do'), which was corrected from the image.
rows.section_header: Recepta Anni 1757 Nov. 2.do ad Annum 1758 ad eundem Diem

rows.notes: Visual override: Identified as a distinct physical line (second part of the header). Corrected spelling from GPT-5-mini's '2do.' to '2.di' based on direct image reading. Gemini-flash had merged this text into its first row's description.

Visual override: Selected gemini-flash for its structure (header, no monetary amounts) as it correctly separates 'Scilicet' as a distinct header line. GPT-5-mini incorrectly associated monetary amounts with this line and classified it as an 'entry'.

Visual override for description: Monetary values were in consensus between extractors. Selected gemini-flash's description ('- ') as the dash visually serves as the description placeholder for this monetary entry, distinct from the 'Scilicet' header above it. GPT-5-mini incorrectly used 'Scilicet' as the description for this monetary entry.

Selected gemini-flash. Its description accurately matches the visible text ('Solvitum Anni præcedentis - '). For the fraction, the symbol is clearly 'q' which, per instructions, denotes a farthing (0.25), correctly identified by gemini-flash. GPT-5-mini misread the description and misinterpreted the fraction symbol as a halfpenny (0.5), as indicated in its note revealing uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Payment received relating to the preceding year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received relating to the preceding year, amounting to £82 2s 8.25d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Monetary amounts (pounds, shillings, pence) are in consensus. The fraction symbol is clearly 'q', which per instructions is a farthing (0.25), correctly identified by gemini-flash. GPT-5-mini incorrectly interpreted the symbol as a halfpenny (0.5).
Visual override for capitalization: Both agreed on text and row type, but gemini-flash's capitalization of 'Solutis' correctly matches the image.

Selected gemini-flash for monetary amounts, specifically the fraction ('q' for 0.25) which is visually present. GPT-5-mini missed the fraction. GPT-5-mini's placement of this row *after* the 'Deductis Solutis' header is logically correct, unlike gemini-flash which placed it before, so the final row order reflects GPT-5-mini's structure.
rows.english_description: Aggregate of payments deducted (items not specified on this line).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Aggregate of payments deducted (items not specified on this line), amounting to £728 11s 0.25d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for monetary amounts, specifically the fraction. The symbol after 9 pence is clearly 'q', which per instructions is 0.25. GPT-5-mini incorrectly interpreted this as 0.5. A discrepancy exists with a strict arithmetic sum from previous rows (9d + 0.25q - (0d + 0.25q) = 9d), but the visual '9q' on the page must be transcribed as 9 pence and 0.25 farthing, adhering to the transcription rules.
Selected gemini-flash. This row is clearly visible on the page as 'a Dno', providing additional context. GPT-5-mini missed this row entirely.
rows.english_description: Payment made to the Lord (Domino) — recipient not further specified on this line.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment made to the Lord (Domino); amount not specified on this line.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of the description text ('Solvenda Computanto.'). GPT-5-mini offered a reconstructed spelling ('solvendo Computantur.') with lower confidence due to perceived stylization, but gemini-flash's reading matches the visible characters more closely.

rows.description: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription, including capitalization ('Computus'), the 'æ' ligature ('præsentes'), and the period after 'viz.' GPT-5-mini had minor transcription differences ('computus', 'presentes', no period after 'viz').
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Its transcription of the name 'Jacobum Cofferam Sub-Rectorum.' is accurate, and its 'entry' row type is correct for a listed signature. GPT-5-mini struggled with the surname ('Iacobum (signature)'), indicated uncertainty in its notes, and incorrectly classified it as a 'header'.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Approval signature of Jacobum Cofferam, Sub-Rector.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Approval signature of Jacobum Cofferam, Sub-Rector.

rows.notes: Visual override for row type: Both agreed on the description and amounts. Selected gemini-flash's 'entry' row type, which is appropriate for a listed name/signature, over GPT-5-mini's incorrect 'header' classification.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Approval signature of Thomas Bray, Dean.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Approval signature of Thomas Bray, Dean.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Its transcription of the description 'Ja. Fortescue! S. T. P.' is highly accurate, including the initial, the exclamation mark, and the spacing in the post-nominal. Its 'entry' row type is also correct. GPT-5-mini had minor transcription differences ('J. Fortescue S.T.P.') and an incorrect row type.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Approval signature of Ja. (James) Fortescue, Doctor of Divinity (S.T.P.).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Approval signature of Ja. Fortescue S.T.P.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Its transcription 'Fran: Upton. S. T. B.' is accurate. GPT-5-mini misread the first name as 'Phil.' and the post-nominal initials ('S.J.B.'), and its notes acknowledged uncertainty, confirming gemini-flash's stronger reading. Gemini-flash also correctly identified the 'entry' row type.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Approval signature of Fran. (Francis) Upton, Bachelor of Sacred Theology (S.T.B.).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Approval signature of Fran. Upton S.T.B.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for precise transcription of 'A. M.' with a space, and correct 'entry' row type. GPT-5-mini had minor spacing difference ('A.M.') and an incorrect row type, though its name reading was consistent.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Approval signature of Robertum Ewings, A.M.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Approval signature of Robertum Ewings A.M.

rows.notes: Visual override: Adopted GPT-5-mini's accurate reading of the surname 'Kennicott'. Corrected the post-nominal to 'A M:' (with colon) as seen in the image, which was correctly captured by gemini-flash (except for the surname). Set row type to 'entry' based on contextual analysis.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Approval signature of Benj. (Benjamin) Kennicott, A.M.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Approval signature of Benj. Kennicott A.M.

rows.notes: Added based on visual inspection. A faint '10' is visible in the left margin next to the last signature. Interpreted as shillings. Both extractors missed this marginal annotation.
rows.section_header: Hic Computus approbatus per præsentes viz.
rows.english_description: Unspecified monetary annotation in the approval section.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Unspecified monetary annotation in the approval section, amounting to 10s.
